query: Infosys Cognition Devin partnership details January 2026 engineering capacity

{"query":"Infosys Cognition Devin partnership details January 2026 engineering capacity","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1749,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.infosys.com/newsroom/press-releases/2026/collaboration-accelerate-ai-value-journey.html","title":"Infosys and Cognition Announce Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate the AI Value Journey for Global Enterprises","content":"The collaboration will deploy Devin across Infosys’ internal engineering ecosystem and client engagements worldwide.
Combining the secure, modular architecture of Infosys Topaz Fabric with Cognition’s advanced agentic and autonomous engineering capabilities, the collaboration aims to help enterprises achieve accelerated time-to-market, enhanced developer productivity, and reduced modernization timelines.
To ensure secure, enterprise-grade adoption, Infosys and Cognition will jointly develop industry-specific solutions, AI-native modernization blueprints, and scalable engineering frameworks, supported by co-innovation labs and enablement programs.
Infosys’ Exponential Engineering offering perfectly complements our mission to redefine how software is built.
Salil Parekh, Chief Executive Officer & Managing Director, Infosys, said, “Our collaboration with Cognition marks a significant step forward in accelerating AI value realization for global enterprises."},{"url":"https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/infosys-and-cognition-announce-strategic-collaboration-to-accelerate-the-ai-value-journey-for-global-enterprises-302655091.html","title":"Infosys and Cognition Announce Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate the AI Value Journey for Global Enterprises","content":"7, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Infosys(NSE: INFY) (BSE: INFY) (NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next generation digital services and consulting, and Cognition, the leading AI coding agent company and makers of Devin, the first AI software engineer, today announced a strategic collaboration to scale Devin across global enterprises.
Infosys Topaz Fabric and Devin together offer unmatched capability from real-time developer augmentation to fully autonomous engineering execution.
Infosys may, from time to time, make additional written and oral forward-looking statements, including statements contained in the Company's filings with the Securities and Exchange Commission and our reports to shareholders."},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/analytics-india-magazine_infosys-has-partnered-with-us-based-cognition-activity-7414672987687362560-MEsd","title":"Infosys Deploys AI Software Engineer Devin Globally with Cognition Partnership | AIM posted on the topic | LinkedIn","content":"Scott Wu, Founder and CEO of Cognition, emphasized the scale and ambition of the collaboration, noting that Infosys is the first large digital services and consulting firm to deploy agentic engineering tools at this level.
The partnership will integrate Cognition's AI software engineer, Devin, with Infosys Topaz Fabric to improve software development and engineering productivity.
Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Cognition to roll out Devin, world’s first fully autonomous AI software engineer.
During its Q3 earnings call, CEO Salil Parekh revealed the company is currently running 4,600 active AI projects and has deployed over 500 AI agents across client environments."},{"url":"https://www.webwire.com/ViewPressRel.asp?aId=348914","title":"Infosys partners with Cognition to expand engineering capacity and help scale its enterprise business | WebWire","content":"By augmenting its workforce with autonomous software engineers, Infosys will dramatically expand its delivery capacity."},{"url":"https://cognition.com/blog","title":"Blog | Cognition","content":"Cognition has raised over $1B at a $26B valuation, led by Lux Capital, General Catalyst, and 8VC.
Cognizant has partnered with Cognition to deploy Devin and Windsurf across its engineering teams and customer base.
SWE-1.5 is now available in Windsurf!
Today we're releasing Claude Sonnet 4.5 in Devin, alongside our new Devin Agent Preview that's over 2x faster and 12% better on our Jr.
Testing OpenAI’s newest o1 series of models with Devin for autonomous coding tasks"}]}

Salil Parekh, CEO and MD of Infosys, said the collaboration with Cognition marks a significant step forward in accelerating AI value realisation for global enterprises. \"By integrating Cognition’s advanced agentic and autonomous engineering expertise with our industry leading domain and delivery capabilities, we are creating a differentiated value proposition for the market,\" he said. 2026 MSP Index Feature Report The governed agent: A new framework for responsible AI at scale.","score":0.8312667,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://cognition.com/blog/infosys-cognition","title":"Infosys partners with Cognition to expand engineering capacity and help scale its enterprise business | Cognition","content":"# Infosys partners with Cognition to expand engineering capacity and help scale its enterprise business. Infosys, a global leader in digital services and consulting, has partnered with Cognition to deploy Devin, the AI software engineer, across its organization and global client base. By augmenting its workforce with autonomous software engineers, Infosys will dramatically expand its delivery capacity. This collaboration represents one of the largest global deployments of agentic software engineering to date, operating within some of the world’s most complex and regulated enterprise environments. Infosys has begun by rolling out Devin in its Financial Services practice, across banking, payments, capital markets, insurance, and wealth management use cases—both within its own teams and inside customer organizations. Infosys will deploy Devin within its own teams to accelerate internal development and delivery. Infosys will deploy and manage Devin directly within customer environments, providing ongoing operation, governance, and optimization of agentic software engineering systems.
